parameters-en.Send: Sets the level of the Send 2 signal. 0.0 dB is unity gain.
parameters-en.Dry Thru: Adjusts the level of the dry (unaffected) signal passing through the Send block. Normally this should be set to 0.0 dB, but when set to -120.0 dB, the Send block can act as an A/B switch, toggling between sending signal to the external device (block enabled) and sending signal through to the next block (block bypassed).
